title: paeonia delavayi var. lutea
intro: Paeonia delavayi var. lutea, also known as the Golden Tree Peony, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Paeonia delavayi plant, a species of flowering plant in the peony family. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Paeonia delavayi var. lutea include relief from menstrual cramps, insomnia, and anxiety, as well as potential anti-cancer and anti-aging properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of menopause and other gynecological issues.
